{{Infobox location
| name = Zykaros system
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A shipping company is registered out of the [[Zykaros system]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zykaros system]] is located one sector away from [[Fathom]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40">''The Pilot'', chapter 40</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Zykaros system]] is the location where [[Veshran]]'s fleet is advancing.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c45">''The Pilot'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
